allow: Bash(curl -sN -X POST http://localhost:3456/api/chat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Kolik klientů je celkem? Jednou větou, bez grafu."}]}' --max-time 60)

Bash(node -e "require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('.env.local','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).forEach\(l => { if\(l.includes\('='\)\) { const [k,...v] = l.split\('='\); process.env[k.trim\(\)] = v.join\('='\).trim\(\); } }\); console.log\('KEY length:', \(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY||''\).length, 'starts:', \(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY||''\).slice\(0,15\)\);")
